arts.ttl: Kane: I was surprised when Tuchel got England job
arts.sum: Harry Kane has admitted he was "surprised" when Thomas Tuchel was named England head coach but said the German brings more "energy and enthusiasm" to the role than predecessor Gareth Southgate.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane hopes to enjoy ‘amazing journey’ under new England boss Thomas Tuchel
arts.sum: Kane will captain his country on Friday in his former Bayern Munich boss’ first game in charge of England.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel urges England to have hunger to win rather than fear to lose
arts.sum: The 51-year-old is preparing to lead the national team for the first time on Friday.

arts.ttl: 'Thomas Tuchel was LUCKY to get the England job,' insists Arsenal legend Jens Lehmann... before laying out a bleak prediction for England's future
arts.sum: The former Gunners star believes Tuchel was fortunate to be hired as Three Lions boss after his rather underwhelming spell with Bundesliga giants Bayern Munich.
Harry Kane has admitted that he was "suprised" when he heard that Thomas Tuchel had been appointed as Gareth Southgate's permanent successor as England manager.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane: "Thomas Tuchel was a big reason why I went to Bayern Munich"
arts.sum: The 31-year-old marksman spoke fondly of his relationship with Bayern Munich's former head coach and current England boss.

arts.ttl: England played with fear, we have to change that - Tuchel
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel says he felt England played with fear during Euro 2024 and wants to change that as his side prepare to face Albania in a 2026 World Cup qualifier at Wembley.

arts.ttl: Tuchel: England were afraid to lose at Euro 2024
arts.sum: Thomas Tuchel has said he believes England struggled to produce consistent performances at Euro 2024 as the players were more afraid of being knocked out of the tournament than they were focused to win it.

arts.ttl: Tuchel expected to go with back four with England vs Albania
arts.sum: All of the evidence suggests Thomas Tuchel is likely to opt for a back four when he takes charge of his first game as England head coach against Albania at Wembley.

arts.ttl: Delap keen to learn from Kane after England call-up
arts.sum: Liam Delap has said he is keen to learn from Harry Kane after being drafted in to train with the England senior side. Delap is part of the England u-21 squad ahead of their friendly fixtures with France and Portugal this month. However, the Ipswich Town striker has been invited to train with the senior […] The post Delap keen to learn from Kane after England call-up first appeared on The Football Faithful.
